results.title: ARKON 1/4"-20 Camera Mounting Thread to 3-Prong GoPro HERO Mount Adapter
results.snippet: The mount features a 3-prong action camera mount with a thumbscrew on top and a 1/4"-20 female thread on the bottom. It is designed to adapt your 2-prong camera mount onto a tripod or rig with a 1/4"-20 screw mount.

results.title: Camera Mounting Bolt to GoPro HERO Mount Connection Adapter
results.snippet: This versatile adapter transforms your standard camera mount or tripod into a GoPro-compatible accessory. Designed to work with mounts, tripods, and other accessories featuring a 1/4"-20 mounting bolt, it is compatible with GoPro HERO4, HERO3+, HERO3, HERO2, and HERO action cameras.

results.title: GoPro Mount 1/4-20 Screw Adapter, Tripod and Cold Shoe Mount
results.snippet: The 3-finger cold shoe mount adapter helps attach your camera to DSLR camera or any device with a cold shoe slot. The standard 1/4'' screw hole at the bottom of the adapter fits for any device with standard 1/4-20 stud.
